mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM inventory
AND (material_name LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%') OR material_id LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory (material_id, material_name, spec_model, current_qty, unit, ref_price) VALUES (#{materialId}, #{materialName}, #{specModel}, #{currentQty}, #{unit}, #{refPrice})
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory SET current_qty = current_qty + #{qty} WHERE material_id = #{materialId}
UPDATE inventory SET current_qty = current_qty + #{qty}, last_inbound_date = CURDATE() WHERE material_id = #{materialId}
UPDATE inventory SET current_qty = current_qty - #{qty}, last_outbound_date = CURDATE() WHERE material_id = #{materialId}
UPDATE inventory SET current_qty = #{qty} WHERE material_id = #{materialId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inventory ORDER BY material_id
